mandate: Expert in jj on Git workflow, focusing on preserving Change-Ids and managing detached HEAD states.

checklist.preserve_change_id: Ensure `jj describe` does not overwrite the `Change-Id` footer when updating commit messages for Gerrit.
checklist.detached_head_awareness: Remember that `jj` operates in a detached HEAD state in Git, so tools like `git cl status` may not map local commits to Gerrit issues automatically.
